functions.name: rubisco.shared.extension.load_extension
documentation:
Load the extension.

Args:
    path (Path | str): The path of the extension or it's name.
        If the path is a name, the extension will be loaded from the
        default extension directory.
    strict (bool, optional): If True, raise an exception if the extension
        loading failed.
A basic extension contains these modules or variables:
- extension/        directory    ---- The extension directory.
- __init__.py   file         ---- The extension module.
- instance  IRUExtention ---- The extension instance

functions.name: rubisco.shared.extension.load_all_extensions
documentation: Load all extensions.

variables.name: rubisco.shared.extension.invalid_ext_names
documentation: Avoid logger's name conflict.

classes.name: rubisco.shared.extension.IRUExtention

methods.name: rubisco.shared.extension.IRUExtention.__init__
documentation:
Construct the instance.

Please DO NOT initialize the extension here.

methods.name: rubisco.shared.extension.IRUExtention.extension_can_load_now
documentation:
Check if the extension can load now.

Some extensions may initialize
optionally like 'CMake' or 'Rust'.

This method MUST be implemented by the subclass.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: Raise if the method is not implemented.

Returns:
    bool: True if the extension can load now, otherwise False.

methods.name: rubisco.shared.extension.IRUExtention.on_load
documentation:
Load the extension.

Initialize the extension here.
This method MUST be implemented by the subclass.

methods.name: rubisco.shared.extension.IRUExtention.reqs_is_sloved
documentation:
Check if the system requirements are solved.

This method should return True if the system requirements are solved,
otherwise False.

This method MUST be implemented by the subclass.

Raises:

documentation:
Output a step message.

Args:
    message (str): Message.
    level (int): Message level. If it <= -1, it will be set to
    `step_level - level - 1`. The effect is as follows:
    ```
        => Level 0 message.
            :: Level 1 message.
            :: Level 1 message.
                :: Level 2 message.
        => Level 0 message.
    ```

functions.name: rubisco.lib.archive.extract_file
documentation:
Extract a compressed data file to destination.

This function only supports gzip, bzip2 and xz compression which are
only supports one-file compression.

Args:
    file (Path): Path to compressed file.
    dest (Path): Destination directory.
    compress_type (str): Compression type. Default is "gz".
    overwrite (bool): Overwrite destination directory if it exists.

Raises:
    AssertionError: If compress is not in ["gz", "bz2", "xz"]

functions.name: rubisco.lib.archive.extract
documentation:
Extract compressed file to destination.

Args:
    file (Path): Path to compressed file.
    dest (Path): Destination file or directory.
    compress_type (str | None, optional): Compression type. It can be "gz",
        "bz2", "xz", "zip", "7z", "tar.gz", "tar.bz2", "tar.xz" and "tar".
        Defaults to None.
    overwrite (bool, optional): Overwrite destination if it exists.
        Defaults to False.
    password (str | None, optional): Password to decrypt compressed file.
        Defaults to None. Tarball is not supported.

functions.name: rubisco.lib.archive.compress_tarball
documentation:
Compress a tarball to destination.

Args:
    src (Path): Source file or directory.
    dest (Path): Destination tarball file.
    start (Path | None, optional): Start directory. Defaults to None.
    ```
        e.g.
            /
            ├── a
            │   ├── b
            │   │   ├── c
            If start is '/a', the tarball will be created as 'b/c'.
            If start is None, the tarball will be created as 'c'.
    ```
    excludes (list[str] | None, optional): List of excluded files.
        Supports glob patterns. Defaults to None.
    compress_type (str | None, optional): Compression type. It can be "gz",
        "bz2", "xz". Defaults to None.
    compress_level (int | None, optional): Compression level. It can be
        0 to 9. Defaults to None. Only for gzip and bzip2. Ignored for
        others.
    overwrite (bool, optional): Overwrite destination if it exists.
        Defaults to False.

functions.name: rubisco.lib.archive.compress_zip
documentation:
Compress a zip file to destination.

Args:
    src (Path): Source file or directory.
    dest (Path): Destination zip file.
    start (Path | None, optional): Start directory. Defaults to None.
    excludes (list[str] | None, optional): List of excluded files.
        Supports glob patterns. Defaults to None.
    compress_level (int | None, optional): Compression level. It can be
        0 to 9. Defaults to None. Only for gzip and bzip2. Ignored for
        others.
    overwrite (bool, optional): Overwrite destination if it exists.
        Defaults to False.

    overwrite (bool, optional): Overwrite destination if it exists.

functions.name: rubisco.lib.archive.compress
